title: Gold Overhaul Mod
description: Overhauls Gold, makes it more useful
body:
Are you like me and like gold items and wish they were better? or maybe more of them, WELL PROBABLY NOT, But presenting the gold overhaul mod, 

It adds Better versions of all the gold tools, such as the Better Gold Pickaxe, Better Gold Axe, Better Gold Sword, and Better Gold Shovel, and a new item called the Better Gold Wand, which acts as an all rounder item, it functions as a pickaxe, sword shovel and maybe an axe i forgot to test if it works as an axe, and a new block, the Heavy Gold Block! its a gold block but it takes longer to break, and has a hardness of 30 and can survive TNT blast,

i didnt add any armor changes, i intended to originally add Better Gold Armor variants But I couldnt because i needed a 3d layered texture for it and Mcreator wouldnt allow me to use the normal gold one. This Mod is nowhere near finished, also if your reading this from Modrinth It might work using the app it might not. i am unsure.
